title: List of Registered Cells, Tissues and Organs (CTO) Establishments - Canada.ca
content:
## List of Registered Cells, Tissues and Organs (CTO) Establishments
In accordance with the Safety of Human Cells, Tissues and Organs for Transplantation Regulations ( CTO Regulations), all source establishments and establishments that distribute or import for further distribution, cells, tissues and organs ( CTO ), must register with Health Canada. The List of Registered CTO Establishments could be used as a reference tool to identify those establishments that have registered with Health Canada.

### To obtain a copy of the List of Registered CTO Establishments, please contact hc.roeb.cto-dgoral.sc@canada.ca .
